title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AMBAGUIO, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA, TO BE KNOWN AS THE AMBAGUIO HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 25221 / 87 OG No. 35, 5035 (Sept. 2, 1991)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7075, June 21, 1991 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AMBAGUIO, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA, TO BE KNOWN AS THE AMBAGUIO HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established a high school in the Municipality of Ambaguio, Province of Nueva Vizcaya, to be known as the Ambaguio High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Education, Culture and Sports shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act is hereby authorized to be appropriated in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated from the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on December 14, 1989 and March 18, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: June 21, 1991

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
